name_invalid_length: Event name must be between 3 and 200 characters
date_in_past: Event date cannot be in the past
province_not_found: The specified province does not exist
canton_not_in_province: The specified canton does not belong to the selected province
canton_requires_province: A province must be specified when selecting a canton
invalid_cover_storage_key: The storage key does not match the expected cover image path for this event
